name: @openfs/wasm
description: Sandboxed virtual filesystem for AI agents. One import, one call — runs in Browser, Node.js, Bun, Deno. No native code.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun run build:js && bun run build:types
scripts.build:js: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --format esm --target browser --external sql.js --external just-bash && bun build src/adapter.ts --outdir dist --format esm --target browser --external sql.js --external just-bash && bun build src/cli.ts --outdir dist --format esm --target node --external sql.js --external just-bash
scripts.build:types: cp src/types.d.ts dist/index.d.ts && cp src/adapter.d.ts dist/adapter.d.ts

author: OpenFS Contributors
